use_cases: Hero section background with flowing particle effects
Interactive ambient background for landing pages
Visual accent for media and portfolio sites
Immersive canvas background for creative dashboards
ai_summary: A generative particle canvas component that renders an animated field of 200 orbiting particles with configurable size, color, and speed. Particles follow a moving source point creating organic, flowing visual effects. Designed as a decorative, immersive background for web applications, particularly suited for hero sections and landing pages where visual impact is needed without functional UI elements.
